commits.title: feat: unify service registry, ports, and multi-instance orchestration
commits.body:
This commit aligns the Service Registry, Docker Compose, and Dopemux CLI with consistent ports and implements multi-instance support.

- Unified Service Registry (services/registry.yaml) with canonical offset pattern.
- Refactored compose.yml to use environment variables for ports.
- Updated instance_manager.py and port_config.py for platform-wide consistency.
- Consolidated startup logic into scripts/start-all-mcp-servers.sh.
- Integrated dopecon-bridge into the MCP registry.
- Fixed conport to run as a proper MCP SSE server from Docker.
